---
name: Feature / Diagnostic request
about: Suggest a new tool, matcher, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem you're facing (e.g. hard-to-diagnose Native HA split-brain in production).

## Describe the solution you'd like

What new behavior or tool would help?

## Additional context

- Which MQ topology?
- Example MQSC output or error (sanitized)?
- Would this be useful for others in banks/telcos/etc.?

## Owner note

New diagnostics must stay strictly read-only and come with verified IBM Knowledge Center citations where possible.
